'''Ephaan Kenzon''' was a [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] discovered on the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]] world of [[Baltimn]], who was brought back to [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] for [[Jedi training/Legends|Jedi training]].

He eventually became the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]] of [[E'koth Tassjun]]. On the verge of being expelled for his unauthorized actions against injustices in the [[Zeemacht Cluster/Legends|Zeemacht Cluster]], he left the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] and opened the [[School of Hidden Wisdom]] on his [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]]. He helped to hide escaping [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knights]] during the [[Great Jedi Purge/Legends|Great Jedi Purge]] at his dueling academy, and also trained [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitives]] in basic Jedi techniques. During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], Kenzon became a covert [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] operative. He and his school came under [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] scrutiny in [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]], but the [[Death/Legends|death]] of [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] saved him and his students from being rooted out by the [[Inquisitorius/Legends|Inquisitorius]].

Several of his apprentices went on to train with [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] at the [[Jedi Praxeum]] on [[Yavin 4/Legends|Yavin 4]].

==Sources==
*<!-- 2002-08-XX -->''[[Power of the Jedi Sourcebook]]''
